strings.h.carpet_cmp: Berechnen Sie die Gesamtkosten jeder Option und vergleichen Sie sie dann. Raten Sie nicht allein anhand des StГјckpreises.
strings.h.carpet_roll: Berechnen Sie, wie viele Meter Rolle Sie benГ¶tigen, um den Raum abzudecken

strings.h.circ_a: A = ПҖrВІ. Tippe 3,14 fГјr ПҖ. Nutze xВІ fГјr das Quadrat.
strings.h.circ_c: C = 2ПҖr. Tippe 3,14 fГјr ПҖ (nicht die ПҖ-Taste).
strings.h.combo_trs_a: FlГӨche = Dreieck + Rechteck + Halbkreis. HГ¶he h = 2r. A = ВҪah + bh + ВҪПҖrВІ.
strings.h.combo_trs_p: Der Umfang verwendet nur AuГҹenkanten: Dreieckshypothenuse + Unterkante (a+b) + Oberkante des Rechtecks вҖӢвҖӢ(b) + Halbkreisbogen (ПҖr). Addieren Sie nicht den gemeinsamen Durchmesser.
strings.h.compare_which: Eine grГ¶Гҹere ungefГӨhre SD (Bereich/4) bedeutet mehr Variation
strings.h.cuft_cuyd: Ein Kubikyard ist 3 FuГҹ Г— 3 FuГҹ Г— 3 FuГҹ
strings.h.drive_len: Verwenden Sie den Satz des Pythagoras: c = вҲҡ(aВІ + bВІ). Beim TI-36X Pro ist die Quadratwurzel das 2. xВІ; вҲҡ auf Casio.
strings.h.drive_slope: Steigung = Anstieg / Lauf (vertikale Г„nderung gegenГјber horizontaler Г„nderung)
strings.h.emp_1sd: Empirische Regel: вүҲ68 % innerhalb einer Standardabweichung vom Mittelwert
strings.h.emp_2sd: Empirische Regel: вүҲ95 % innerhalb von 2 SD des Mittelwerts
strings.h.emp_3sd: вүҲ99,7 % innerhalb von 3 SD, also etwa 0,3 % auГҹerhalb der Gesamtmenge вҶ’ ~0,15 % in jedem Schwanz
strings.h.emp_below: Unter 1 SD links vom Mittelwert вүҲ die HГӨlfte der 32 % auГҹerhalb der Mitte 68 % вҶ’ ~16 %
strings.h.fence: Konvertieren Sie Zoll in FuГҹ, dann ist P = 2(L+W). Geben Sie Zoll Г· 12 auf dem Rechner ein.
strings.h.fence_roll: Konvertieren Sie die Abmessungen in FuГҹ, ermitteln Sie den Umfang P = 2(L+B) und wГӨhlen Sie dann die kleinste Rolle aus, die mindestens P betrГӨgt.
strings.h.gal_l: Gallonen вҶ’ Liter umrechnen und dann durch die FlaschengrГ¶Гҹe dividieren.
strings.h.literacy: Gute Fragen: Wer wurde befragt? Wie groГҹ war die Stichprobe? Was wird verglichen? Sind Achsen abgeschnitten?
strings.h.lshape_a: FlГӨche von L = FlГӨche des groГҹen Rechtecks вҖӢвҖӢвҲ’ FlГӨche des ausgeschnittenen StГјcks
strings.h.lshape_p: Gehen Sie an der AuГҹenkante entlang: Der Schnitt fГјgt Kanten hinzu und entfernt sie, die sich aufheben вҖ“ P = 2(B+H)
strings.h.map_to_real: Multiplizieren Sie die Kartenzoll mit dem Skalierungsfaktor (FuГҹ pro Zoll).
strings.h.mean: Mittelwert = Summe der Werte Г· Anzahl der Werte. Zuerst addieren, dann teilen.
strings.h.median: Sortieren Sie die Daten; Median ist der Mittelwert (oder Durchschnitt zweier Mittelwerte)
strings.h.mode: Modus = Wert, der am hГӨufigsten erscheint
strings.h.pct_from_z: Use the z-score / percentile table shown with this question. Find your z in the left column; the percentile is listed beside it. Round to the nearest whole number if asked.
strings.h.pizza_cmp: FlГӨche = ПҖrВІ. Durch die Verdoppelung des Durchmessers (oder Radius) wird die FlГӨche mit 4 multipliziert.
strings.h.pizza_double: A = ПҖrВІ, also wenn r вҶ’ 2r, dann A вҶ’ ПҖ(2r)ВІ = 4ПҖrВІ
strings.h.range_rule: Faustregel fГјr die Reichweite: s вүҲ Reichweite / 4.
strings.h.real_to_map: Teilen Sie die tatsГӨchliche Entfernung durch FuГҹ pro Zoll.
strings.h.rect_a: A = L Г— B. Geben Sie beim TI-36X Pro / Casio LГӨnge Г— Breite und dann = ein.
strings.h.rect_p: P = 2L + 2W (oder 2(L+W)). Geben Sie beim TI-36X Pro/Casio den Ausdruck und dann = ein.
strings.h.sd_tf: Z-Scores kГ¶nnen jede beliebige reelle Zahl sein вҖ“ die Daten kГ¶nnen relativ zum Mittelwert an einer beliebigen Stelle liegen.
strings.h.skew: Rechtsschiefe verschiebt den Mittelwert in Richtung des langen rechten Schwanzes.
strings.h.skew_left_effect: Linksschiefe Daten ziehen normalerweise den Mittelwert links vom Median (Mittelwert < Median).
strings.h.skew_right_effect: Rechtsschiefe Daten verschieben den Mittelwert normalerweise nach rechts vom Median (ungefГӨhr Modus вҖһMittelwert > Median >вҖң).
strings.h.skew_shape: Skew ist nach der Long-Tail-Richtung benannt.
strings.h.skew_uniform_effect: Mittelwert, Median und Modus liegen tendenziell nahe beieinander.
strings.h.soup: V = ПҖrВІh und r = Durchmesser/2. Geben Sie 3.14 fГјr ПҖ ein (nicht die ПҖ-Taste).
strings.h.sqft_sqyd: Ein Quadratmeter ist 3 FuГҹ Г— 3 FuГҹ groГҹ
strings.h.tri_area: A = ВҪbh. Geben Sie auf Ihrem Taschenrechner die HГӨlfte Г— GrundflГӨche Г— HГ¶he ein.
strings.h.tv: Diagonale ist Hypotenuse: HГ¶he = вҲҡ(DiagonalВІ вҲ’ BreiteВІ). Auf das nГӨchste Zehntel runden.
strings.h.zscore: z = (x вҲ’ Mittelwert) / Standardabweichung. Geben Sie sorgfГӨltig mit Klammern ein.

strings.hint_overview.generic: Overview: read the question carefully, list what you know, choose the right formula or rule, substitute values, then compute and round only at the end.
strings.hint_overview.conversions: Overview: write the given amount, multiply by a conversion fraction so unwanted units cancel, then simplify.
strings.hint_overview.formulas: Overview: identify the shape/measure (perimeter, area, volume, etc.), recall its formula, then match symbols to the letters in the prompt.
strings.hint_overview.perimeter_area: Overview: decide if you need distance around (perimeter) or space inside (area). Break composite figures into familiar shapes, label every length, then add/subtract carefully.
strings.hint_overview.volume: Overview: find the base area first (or use the solidвҖҷs formula), multiply by height when needed, and use ПҖ = 3.14 when the problem says so.
strings.hint_overview.pythagorean: Overview: identify the right triangleвҖҷs legs and hypotenuse. For length use вҲҡ(aВІ+bВІ) or вҲҡ(cВІвҲ’aВІ); for slope use rise/run.
strings.hint_overview.scale_rates: Overview: write a proportion from the scale (map:real), solve for the missing side, and keep units consistent.
strings.hint_overview.scaling: Overview: area scales with the square of the scale factor; volume scales with the cube. Compare totals after scaling each piece.
strings.hint_overview.stats_center: Overview: sort the data if needed. Mean = sumГ·n, median = middle, mode = most frequent, range = maxвҲ’min.
strings.hint_overview.stats_spread: Overview: use the range rule of thumb s вүҲ range/4, or compare ranges/approximate SDs across data sets.
strings.hint_overview.z_scores: Overview: z = (x вҲ’ mean) / SD. Percentiles come from the area to the left of z on a standard normal.
strings.hint_overview.distributions: Overview: name the shape from the long tail (skew) or use the empirical rule (68% / 95% / 99.7%) for roughly normal data.
strings.hint_overview.literacy: Overview: ask who was surveyed, how large the sample was, and whether the graph or claim could mislead.

strings.h.cuyd_to_cuft: 1 cubic yard = 27 cubic feet, so multiply by 27.
strings.q.gal_l.v4: A food-storage drum holds {gallons} gallons of wheat-freeвҖҰ wait, milk for the breakfast. How many {bottleL}-liter bottles fill it? (1 gal = 3.785 L). Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.gal_l.v5: Convert {gallons} gallons to {bottleL}-liter bottles (1 gal = 3.785 L). Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.gal_l.v6: The cultural-hall mop bucket recipe calls for {gallons} gallons of cleaner concentrate. How many {bottleL}-liter bottles is that? (1 gal = 3.785 L). Round to hundredths.

strings.notes_sort_desc_title: Sort numbers descending (uses selection if any)

strings.mode_finalboss_ready: Face the Gadianton Robber В· save Zarahemla
strings.mode_finalboss_cleared: Zarahemla is safe вң“ В· ready for the assessment
strings.boss_start: A Gadianton Robber threatens Zarahemla. Answer one unaided question from each topic вҖ” no hints. One miss, and he escapes on that subject (it drops to 9/10).
strings.boss_ok: The robber staggers В· {current}/{total}. Press on for Zarahemla.
strings.boss_fail: Zarahemla is in danger. The Gadianton Robber slips away on {topic} вҖ” that topic drops to {progress}. Rebuild it to 10/10, then face him again.
strings.boss_win: The Gadianton Robber is defeated вҖ” Zarahemla is saved. YouвҖҷre ready for the assessment.
strings.boss_win_again: Zarahemla stands again. Still looking assessment-ready.
strings.q.feet_in_yard.boss: How many feet are in one yard? (Captain Moroni needs the conversion before pacing the walls of Zarahemla against the Gadianton Robbers.)
strings.q.yd_to_ft.boss: HelamanвҖҷs scouts stretch a banner {yards} yards long along ZarahemlaвҖҷs outer wall. How many feet is that?
strings.q.sqft_sqyd.boss: How many square feet are in one square yard? (Vital when reclaiming floor space after a Gadianton raid on Zarahemla.)
strings.q.sqyd_to_sqft.boss: The Nephites reclaim {sqYd} square yards of plaza stone in Zarahemla after Gadianton sabotage. How many square feet is that? (9 sq ft = 1 sq yd)
strings.q.cuft_cuyd.boss: How many cubic feet are in one cubic yard? (Grain stores for a siege of Zarahemla demand this conversion.)
strings.q.cuyd_to_cuft.boss: Captain Moroni orders {cuYd} cubic yards of earth for earthworks around Zarahemla. How many cubic feet is that?
strings.q.dim_concept.boss: Which statement is correct? (Answer wiselyвҖ”Gadianton spies twist length, area, and volume to confuse ZarahemlaвҖҷs builders.)
strings.q.form_sq_p.boss: What is the formula for the perimeter of a square with side length s? (MoroniвҖҷs square watch-tower plans depend on it.)
strings.q.form_sq_a.boss: What is the formula for the area of a square with side length s? (Needed for the square plazas of Zarahemla.)
strings.q.form_rect_p.boss: What is the formula for the perimeter of a rectangle with length L and width W? (Fence the rectangular barracks before the Gadiantons strike.)
strings.q.form_rect_a.boss: What is the formula for the area of a rectangle with length L and width W? (Supply-floor math for HelamanвҖҷs camp.)
strings.q.form_tri_p.boss: What is the formula for the perimeter of a triangle with sides a, b, and c? (Triangular signal-fires near Bountiful need the outer path.)
strings.q.form_tri_a.boss: What is the formula for the area of a triangle with base b and height h? (Triangular lookouts over the land of Zarahemla.)
strings.q.form_circ_c.boss: What is the formula for the circumference of a circle with radius r? (Circular watch-rings around the cityвҖҷs approaches.)
strings.q.form_circ_a.boss: What is the formula for the area of a circle with radius r? (Circular muster grounds for the stripling warriors.)
strings.q.form_cube.boss: What is the formula for the volume of a cube with side s? (Cubic supply chests for ZarahemlaвҖҷs defenders.)
strings.q.form_sphere.boss: What is the formula for the volume of a sphere with radius r? (Spherical signal stones used by Nephite scouts.)
strings.q.form_cyl.boss: What is the formula for the volume of a cylinder with radius r and height h? (Cylindrical water cisterns under siege.)
strings.q.form_pyth.boss: Which equation is the Pythagorean Theorem for a right triangle with legs a, b and hypotenuse c? (Right-angled rampartsвҖ”MoroniвҖҷs favorite geometry.)
strings.q.rect_p.boss: Gadianton Robbers probe a rectangular gate-yard in Zarahemla measuring {L} ft by {W} ft. Captain Moroni needs the fencing length around it. What is its perimeter in feet?
strings.q.rect_p.boss2: HelamanвҖҷs stripling warriors mark a rectangular muster field {L} ft by {W} ft outside ZarahemlaвҖҷs walls. What is the perimeter in feet?
strings.q.rect_a.boss: Nephite quartermasters measure a rectangular armory floor in Zarahemla: {L} ft by {W} ft. What is the floor area in square feet?
strings.q.rect_a.boss2: After a Gadianton fire, builders restore a rectangular hall in Bountiful {L} ft by {W} ft. What is its area in square feet?
strings.q.tri_area.boss: Scouts map a triangular ridge overlooking Zarahemla with base {b} units and height {h} unitsвҖ”prime Gadianton ambush ground. What is its area? Round to the nearest hundredth if needed.
strings.q.circ_c.boss: A circular watch-tower ring around Zarahemla has radius {r} inches on the engineerвҖҷs model. What is its circumference? {pi_note}
strings.q.circ_a.boss: A circular signal drumhead used by HelamanвҖҷs runners has radius {r}. What is its area? {pi_note}
strings.q.combo_trs_a.boss: Find the area of the composite figure shown below (right triangle + rectangle + semicircle)вҖ”a fortified outpost plan near Zarahemla. Use the labeled lengths: triangle base {a}, rectangle width {b}, semicircle radius {r}. The shared height equals the diameter (2r). {pi_note}
strings.q.combo_trs_p.boss: Find the perimeter of the composite figure shown below (right triangle + rectangle + semicircle)вҖ”walk only the outer wall HelamanвҖҷs men must defend. Use the labeled lengths: triangle base {a}, rectangle width {b}, semicircle radius {r}. Do not count shared internal sides. Height equals the diameter (2r). {pi_note}
strings.q.lshape_a.boss: Gadianton saboteurs leave ZarahemlaвҖҷs storehouse as an L-shaped floor fitting in a {W} Г— {H} rectangle, with a {cutW} Г— {cutH} rectangle cut from one corner. What is the area of the L-shape?
strings.q.lshape_p.boss: MoroniвҖҷs L-shaped barricade fits in a {W} Г— {H} rectangle with a {cutW} Г— {cutH} corner notch removed. What is the outer perimeter of the L-shape?
strings.q.fence_need.boss: Captain Moroni must fence a rectangular supply yardвҖ”{ft1} feet {in1} inches by {ft2} feet {in2} inchesвҖ”before Gadianton raiders strike Zarahemla by night. How many feet of fencing do you need to go around it? Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.fence_roll.boss: AmmonвҖҷs remnant fences a plot {ft1}' {in1}" by {ft2}' {in2}" near the borders. Fencing comes in 50-ft or 100-ft rolls. Which roll do you need?
strings.q.soup.boss: Under siege, Zarahemla stores grain in a cylindrical jar. The base is {d} inches across (diameter) and the jar is {h} inches high. What is the volume? {pi_note}
strings.q.cube_vol.boss: Stripling warriors find a cubic chest of side length {s} inchesвҖ”sealed against Gadianton thieves. What is its volume?
strings.q.sphere_vol.boss: A spherical signal stone used by Nephite lookouts has radius {r} inches. What is its volume? {pi_note}
strings.q.drive_slope.boss: The approach road into Zarahemla rises {rise} ft over a horizontal distance of {run} ftвҖ”steep enough to slow Gadianton chargers. What is the slope? Write as a simplified ratio rise:run or as a fraction rise/run.
strings.q.drive_len.boss: A fortified ramp into Bountiful rises {rise} ft over a horizontal distance of {run} ft. What is the slant length of that ramp? Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.tv.boss: Nephite mapmakers study a {diagonal}-inch rectangular battle chart that is {width} inches wide (the Title of Liberty briefing board). How tall is it? Round to the nearest tenth.
strings.q.gal_l.boss: ZarahemlaвҖҷs cistern holds {gallons} gallons of water for the siege. How many {bottleL}-liter skins will it take to fill it? (1 gallon = 3.785 liters). Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.map_to_real.boss: HelamanвҖҷs campaign map uses a scale of 1 inch : {scaleFt} feet. A Gadianton camp is {inches} inches away on the map. How many feet down the trail is it?
strings.q.real_to_map.boss: A Nephite war map of the land of Zarahemla has scale 1 inch : {scaleFt} feet. A lookout post is {feet} feet down the trail. How many inches away is it on the map? Round to the nearest hundredth if needed.
strings.q.carpet_roll.boss: Rebuilders cover a {L} ft Г— {W} ft council chamber in Zarahemla after Gadianton arson. Flooring comes in a roll {rollW} ft wide at ${cost} per linear foot (installed). How much does this choice cost? Round to the nearest cent.
strings.q.carpet_yd.boss: A {L} ft Г— {W} ft hall in Bountiful needs new flooring after the raid. It costs ${cost} per square yard (installed). How much does this choice cost? Round to the nearest cent. (9 sq ft = 1 sq yd)
strings.q.carpet_cmp.boss: ZarahemlaвҖҷs builders compare flooring for a {L}'Г—{W}' room. Option A: {rollW}'-wide roll at ${costLin}/linear ft. Option B: ${costYd}/sq yd. Which is cheaper?
strings.q.pizza_cmp.boss: After victory, the camp shares round cakes: which has more areaвҖ”two {small}-inch cakes or one {large}-inch cake? {pi_note}
strings.q.pizza_double.boss: What happens to the area of a circular Nephite signal disc when you double the radius?
strings.q.ball_double.boss: A spherical signal stone holds {base} cubic inches of air. If the stripling warriors craft one with twice the radius, how much air would it hold?
strings.q.ball_half.boss: A spherical scout float holds {base} cubic inches of air. A smaller stone with half the radiusвҖ”hidden for a quiet approach on Gadianton campsвҖ”how much air would it hold?
strings.q.mean.boss: Daily scout reports of Gadianton sightings near Zarahemla: {ds}. Find the mean. Round to the nearest hundredth if needed.
strings.q.mean.boss2: Stripling-warrior drill scores under Helaman: {ds}. Find the mean. Round to the nearest hundredth if needed.
strings.q.median.boss: Night-watch headcounts on ZarahemlaвҖҷs walls: {ds}. Find the median (the middle value after sorting).
strings.q.mode.boss: Coded signal-fire choices from the watchtowers: {ds}. Find the modeвҖ”the code used most often.
strings.q.range.boss: Captured Gadianton supply counts by band: {ds}. Find the range (max вҲ’ min).
strings.q.best_outliers.boss: Which measure of center is usually best when data has extreme outliers (like one night when Gadianton numbers spike wildly outside Zarahemla)?
strings.q.best_cat.boss: Which measure of center is best for favorite banner color / battle-cry type (categorical) data among Nephite companies?
strings.q.best_sym.boss: Which measure of center uses every numeric value and fits roughly symmetric data well (like fairly even watch rotations in Zarahemla)?
strings.q.range_rule.boss: Use the range rule of thumb to approximate the standard deviation of {ds} (Gadianton raid counts). Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.compare_sd.boss: {which}: {ds}. Approximate the standard deviation using the range rule of thumb. (Compare Nephite muster tallies under pressure.)
strings.q.sd_tf.boss: True or False: Data points must be exactly 1, 2, or 3 standard deviations above or below the mean. (Even MoroniвҖҷs muster rolls can sit anywhere relative to the mean.)
strings.q.zscore.boss: A Zarahemla readiness drill has mean {mean} and standard deviation {sd}. What is the z-score for a score of {score}? Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.zscore.boss2: HelamanвҖҷs archery scores have mean {mean} and standard deviation {sd}. What is the z-score for a score of {score}? Round to the nearest hundredth.
strings.q.pct_from_z.boss: Using the standard normal (Z) table shown with this question, about what percentile is a scout whose z-score is {z} among ZarahemlaвҖҷs defenders? Enter the percentile as a number (e.g. 84 for the 84th percentile). Round to the nearest whole number.
strings.q.z_from_pct.boss: Using the z-score / percentile table shown, what z-score corresponds to percentile {pct} among Nephite readiness scores?
strings.q.skew_right.boss: A histogram of Gadianton raid sizes piles most values on the left with a long tail stretching to the right (a few massive assaults on Zarahemla). How would you describe the distribution?
strings.q.skew_left.boss: A histogram of Nephite watch durations piles most values on the right with a long tail stretching to the left (rare very short watches). How would you describe the distribution?
strings.q.skew_uniform.boss: Looking at daily grain rations in Bountiful that stay in a narrow band with no long tail, how would you describe the distribution?
strings.q.skew_effect_follow.boss: What does this do to mean, median, and mode?
strings.q.emp_1sd.boss: Ages of Nephite defenders in a (hypothetical) Zarahemla roster are roughly normal with mean {mean} years and SD {sd} years. About what percentage are between {lo} and {hi}?
strings.q.emp_1sd.boss2: Years of service among HelamanвҖҷs stripling warriors are roughly normal with mean {mean} and SD {sd}. About what percentage fall between {lo} and {hi}?
strings.q.emp_2sd.boss: Years since first watch assignment among adults in Bountiful are roughly normal with mean {mean} and SD {sd}. About what percentage fall between {lo} and {hi}?
strings.q.emp_3sd.boss: Ages of captains under Moroni are roughly normal with mean {mean} years and SD {sd} years. About what percentage are older than {cut}?
strings.q.emp_below.boss: Ages of new stripling recruits are roughly normal with mean {mean} and SD {sd}. About what percentage are younger than {cut}?
strings.q.literacy.boss: As you defend Zarahemla with both courage and sound judgmentвҖ”which practice best helps you use statistics for good decision-making against Gadianton deception?
